args: from src.server import create_app; from src.config import AppConfig; app=create_app(AppConfig()); client=app.test_client(); print('perf', client.get('/api/performance').status_code); print('cache', client.get('/api/cache-stats').status_code); print('alerts', client.get('/api/alerts').status_code)
